greeting.speaker: Skeptical Voter
greeting.text: Oh great, another politician at my door. What do you want?

choices.text: I'm here to listen to what matters to you.
Your vote could make the difference.
Forget it, I'll try next door.

listen_response.speaker: Skeptical Voter
listen_response.text: Huh. Most of you just talk. Fine... I'm worried about {crisis}. What are you actually going to do about it?

choices.text: I have a detailed plan. Let me explain.
We need to work together as a community.

crisis_response.speaker: Skeptical Voter
crisis_response.text: Yeah, everyone wants to 'talk about it.' What makes you different from {opponent_name}?

choices.text: I actually live in this district. I'm affected too.
I have the money to actually make changes.

vote_success.speaker: Skeptical Voter
vote_success.text: You know what? You might be right. I'll think about it.

vote_failure.speaker: Skeptical Voter
vote_failure.text: That's what they all say. My vote never matters anyway.

plan_response.speaker: Skeptical Voter
plan_response.text: Okay... that actually makes some sense. I'm not saying I believe you, but at least you've thought about it.

community_response.speaker: Skeptical Voter
community_response.text: Community. Right. Good luck with that.

local_response.speaker: Skeptical Voter
local_response.text: Fair point. {opponent_name} doesn't even live here. Still doesn't mean you'll actually do anything.

money_response.speaker: Skeptical Voter
money_response.text: Money, huh? Where's that money coming from? Never mind, I don't want to know.

end_positive.speaker: Skeptical Voter
end_positive.text: Alright, you've got my attention. Don't make me regret it.

end_neutral.speaker: Skeptical Voter
end_neutral.text: We'll see. Good luck out there.
